demographics.living_situation: lives with her mother and grandmother

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Her left leg looks suddenly shorter than the right, and she screams in agony if I try to open her legs to change her nappy. (Reported by the mother, with the grandmother also present.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on over the last few hours and she is in so much pain when I move that leg — I don't know what's happened to my baby.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 6 hours ago, during a routine nappy change
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 6 hours and it seems to be getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: she screams inconsolably and stiffens up whenever I try to spread her legs apart; the left leg looks shorter than the right
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she screams in agony — I have never heard her cry like this
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: her left leg and hip area
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst whenever I try to open her legs or change her nappy; she settles a bit when I keep her swaddled and still
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping her wrapped up and not moving that leg; a dose of infant paracetamol barely helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: opening her legs apart, nappy changes, moving the left leg
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: she has stopped kicking her left leg the way she normally does
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before; her nan had mentioned the skin folds on her bottom looked a bit uneven, but she'd been fine otherwise
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: she's only 4 months old so she isn't crawling or walking, but she's barely moving that left leg now

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: born at full term, healthy pregnancy, generally a well baby
her grandmother had noticed the skin creases on her left buttock and thigh looked deeper and uneven compared to the right

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one dose given about 2 hours ago

family_history_as_reported.narrative: there's a history of hip trouble on my side of the family — I think a couple of us needed something done to our hips as babies

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: first baby; we carry her a lot in a narrow-based baby carrier

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened first-time mother, seeking urgent reassurance and answers

paediatric_context.developmental_concerns: pre-ambulatory 4-month-old; carer reports reduced spontaneous movement of the left leg today

objective_data_offered.value: when I lay her down and bend both knees up, the left knee sits lower and the left leg looks shorter than the right
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent observation on video, not a clinician measurement

objective_data_offered.value: deeper, uneven skin creases on the left buttock and thigh compared with the right
she cries inconsolably and stiffens when the left hip is opened or the leg is moved, and has stopped kicking the left leg
37.1 C on a home forehead thermometer
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home forehead thermometer; a normal reading does not exclude a joint infection in a young infant

objective_data_offered.value: the leg looks a normal colour and feels warm to touch, the same as the other leg
